series_metadata.series_description: Memos from Director, Deputy Director, or other senior staff that set forth office policies or procedures.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain microfilm in LSC Library ; Electronic: Beginning with records for 2002, during fifth year convert to tif images. Beginning wiht records for 2014, during fifth year convert to pdf images. Erase original files after converted images have been checked for quality and completeness. Continually maintain DVD of images and online archive of images in the LSC Library ; Paper: Retain as active file in Director''s office for four years. During fifth year, microfilm for Library retention. Destroy hard copy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness. Beginning with records for 2002, during the fifth year convert to tif images. Beginning with records for 2014, during the fifth year convert to pdf images. Recycle original files after converted images have been checked for quality and completeness. Continually maintain DVD of images and online archive of images in the LSC Library, Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Recycle
